title: Finally… A NotebookLM Alternative With an API
summary: Open Notebook is a self-hosted, open-source alternative to Google NotebookLM that provides developers with an API and greater control over document management, code, research, and AI workflows. The platform supports features like grounded question-answering over custom sources and podcast generation from documents.
writeup: This video covers Open Notebook, a self-hosted, open-source alternative to Google NotebookLM aimed at developers who want an API and more control over document management, research, code, and AI workflows. The API focus matters because it allows programmatic integration that the hosted NotebookLM does not expose. Key takeaways: the platform supports grounded question-answering over custom sources and generates podcasts from documents, with self-hosting providing greater control over the underlying data.
